# Configuration reference (`KDIVE_*`)

## build

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_BUILD_COMPONENT_ROOTS` | worker | — | no | Colon-separated extra component roots merged into a build. |
| `KDIVE_BUILD_WORKSPACE` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/build` | no | Worker scratch root for kernel builds. |
| `KDIVE_KERNEL_SRC` | worker | `` | no | Kernel source tree the worker builds from. |

## catalog

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_FIXTURE_CATALOG_PATH` | reconciler, worker | — | no | Override path to the provider fixture catalog. |

## database

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_DATABASE_URL` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | — | yes | Postgres DSN for the system-of-record. |

## debug

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_CRASH_DIR` | worker | — | no | Directory for local kdump crash captures (live_vm path). |
| `KDIVE_DEBUG_DIR` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/debug` | no | Directory for debug-session transcripts. |

## fault-inject

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_FAULT_INJECT` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | — | no | Presence (1/true/yes) registers the fault-injection provider. |

## http

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_HTTP_HOST` | server | `127.0.0.1` | no | Bind host for the MCP server. |
| `KDIVE_HTTP_PORT` | server | `8000` | no | Bind port for the MCP server. |

## install

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_INSTALL_STAGING` | worker | `/var/lib/kdive/install` | no | Worker staging root for install artifacts. |

## lease

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_LEASE_DEFAULT` | server | — | no | Default lease window (hours) when a request omits one (built-in 4). |
| `KDIVE_LEASE_MAX` | server | — | no | Hard cap (hours) on a lease window / renewal (built-in 24). |

## logging

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_LOG_LEVEL` | migrate, reconciler, server, worker | `INFO` | no | Structured-logging level (overridable by --log-level). |

## objectstore

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_S3_BUCKET` | reconciler, server, worker | — | no | Bucket holding vmcores, transcripts, and uploads. |
| `KDIVE_S3_ENDPOINT_URL` | reconciler, server, worker | — | no | S3-compatible endpoint URL for bulk artifacts. |
| `KDIVE_S3_REGION` | reconciler, server, worker | `us-east-1` | no | Region for the object-store client. |

## oidc

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_OIDC_AUDIENCE` | server | — | yes | Expected token audience (aud), enforced natively. |
| `KDIVE_OIDC_ISSUER` | server | — | yes | Expected token issuer (iss), enforced natively. |
| `KDIVE_OIDC_JWKS_URI` | server | — | yes | JWKS URI the bearer-token verifier fetches signing keys from. |

## secrets

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_SECRETS_ROOT` | reconciler, server, worker | `/var/lib/kdive/secrets` | no | Root directory for the file-ref secret backend. |

## ssh

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_SSH_KEY_DIR` | worker | — | no | Override for the managed SSH keypair directory (absolute). Read standalone by the builder's host python; documented here for the contract. |

## upload

| Variable | Processes | Default | Required | Value |
|----------|-----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `KDIVE_MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES` | server | `5368709120` | no | Maximum accepted upload size in bytes. |
| `KDIVE_UPLOAD_TTL_SECONDS` | server | `86400` | no | Presigned upload-URL TTL in seconds. |
